mapper.select: SELECT event_id, event_name, capacity_per_second, admission_window_seconds, event_status, active_yn, starts_at, ends_at, created_at, updated_at FROM queue_event WHERE event_id = #{eventId} AND active_yn = 'Y' AND event_status = 'OPEN' AND (starts_at IS NULL OR starts_at <= SYSTIMESTAMP) AND (ends_at IS NULL OR ends_at >= SYSTIMESTAMP)
SELECT event_id, event_name, capacity_per_second, admission_window_seconds, event_status, active_yn, starts_at, ends_at, created_at, updated_at FROM queue_event WHERE event_id = #{eventId}

SELECT event_id, event_name, capacity_per_second, admission_window_seconds, event_status, active_yn, starts_at, ends_at, created_at, updated_at FROM queue_event WHERE active_yn = 'Y' AND event_status = 'OPEN' AND (starts_at IS NULL OR starts_at <= SYSTIMESTAMP) AND (ends_at IS NULL OR ends_at >= SYSTIMESTAMP) ORDER BY event_id
mapper.update: MERGE INTO queue_event target USING ( SELECT #{eventId} AS event_id FROM dual ) source ON (target.event_id = source.event_id) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET target.event_name = #{eventName}, target.capacity_per_second = #{capacityPerSecond}, target.admission_window_seconds = #{admissionWindowSeconds}, target.event_status = #{eventStatus}, target.active_yn = #{activeYn}, target.starts_at = #{startsAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, target.ends_at = #{endsAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, target.updated_at = #{updatedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( event_id, event_name, capacity_per_second, admission_window_seconds, event_status, active_yn, starts_at, ends_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{eventId}, #{eventName}, #{capacityPerSecond}, #{admissionWindowSeconds}, #{eventStatus}, #{activeYn}, #{startsAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{endsAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createdAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.select: SELECT queue_entry_id, event_id, user_id, queue_token, queue_sequence, status, entered_at, admission_token, admitted_at, admission_expires_at, created_at, updated_at FROM queue_entry WHERE event_id = #{eventId} AND user_id = #{userId}

SELECT queue_entry_id, event_id, user_id, queue_token, queue_sequence, status, entered_at, admission_token, admitted_at, admission_expires_at, created_at, updated_at FROM queue_entry WHERE event_id = #{eventId} AND admission_token = #{admissionToken}
mapper.insert:
SELECT seq_queue_entry.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO queue_entry ( queue_entry_id, event_id, user_id, queue_token, queue_sequence, status, entered_at, admission_token, admitted_at, admission_expires_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{queueEntryId}, #{eventId}, #{userId}, #{queueToken}, #{queueSequence}, #{status}, #{enteredAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{admissionToken, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{admittedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{admissionExpiresAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createdAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.update: UPDATE queue_entry SET queue_token = #{queueToken}, queue_sequence = #{queueSequence}, status = 'WAITING', entered_at = #{enteredAt}, admission_token = NULL, admitted_at = NULL, admission_expires_at = NULL, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE event_id = #{eventId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND status IN ('EXPIRED', 'ENTERED')
